testing_progress.highlight: glamsterdam-devnet-5 unstable: Prysm peering bug (fix rolling out) + Grandine fork-choice bug (unfixed); triggered by Nico's malicious Lodestar client building on empty
Prysm was broadcasting invalid PTC attestations across shuffling boundaries during long forks; lazy fix deployed — skip PTC duty if not in committee on seen block's shuffling
All clients currently use canonical head only for PTC duties; Potuz flags serious liveness risk if multiple branches exist with no cross-branch PTC attestations

glamsterdam_spec_and_api.highlight: Gloas Proposer Preference API PR (beacon-APIs #608): adds POST/GET endpoints + SSE; deprecates prepare-beacon-proposer and register-validator; no objections, left to maintainers to merge
QUIC-as-primary-transport PR: consensus to keep MPLEX as fallback for now; Lighthouse to drop MPLEX ~Gloas+2months; Teku and Nimbus need more time; Nimbus has implementation but not default
Beacon API: validator pending states need renaming post-EIP-6110/EIP-7251 (pending-queued no longer reflects reality); PR open, breaking change — would require API version bump
Beacon API PR #606: extend /eth/v1/node/peers with optional peer scoring + disconnect reasons; non-breaking; no objections

epbs_builder.highlight: EIP-8282 (separate builder deposit contract): routes around DOS attack surface on shared validator/builder deposit contract; ~copy of EIP-7002/7251 contract; right solution but would delay fork; revisit Monday at ACDT
Staked Builder API (builder-specs #138): Parithosh merging after call; can iterate via follow-up PRs

submitBeaconBlock builder API (builder-specs #162): stateful mapping concern raised — beacon node must track which builder URL supplied each bid; deferred pending more client implementation experience

eip_proposals_hegota.highlight: EIP-8243 (Pre-aggregating Attestations at Source): operators with co-scheduled validators send one pre-aggregated attestation via batcher + batch-seal; estimated 2x wire reduction; spam capped at 2× committee size; questions raised about benefit vs. just increasing aggregator count

action_items.action: Client teams review EIP-8282 attack scenarios (S1–S9+) and estimate caching effort vs. new contract cost; bring Justin to ACDT Monday
Client teams engage on beacon-APIs #618 (validator state rename PR); consider tooling breakage and version bump
action_items.owner: CL client teams + ecosystem tooling authors

decisions.decision: Gloas Proposer Preference API (beacon-APIs #608) approved; maintainers to merge
QUIC: keep MPLEX as fallback; target MPLEX removal ~Gloas+2 months; no MPLEX removal bundled with Gloas itself
EIP-8282 (builder deposit contract) deferred; revisit at ACDT Monday with attack severity quantification and Justin present
Staked Builder API (builder-specs #138) to be merged by Parithosh after call; iterate via follow-up PRs
